     ],
     "printed_row_totals": [188, 714, 1192, 1429, 1417, 1519, 1363, 1175, 835, 317],
     "printed_col_totals": [1013, 898, 740, 698, 505, 2218, 1723, 1216, 778, 267, 80, 13]}
  ],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "<25", "sources": ["Under 25"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25-29"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30-34"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},

  "col_map": [

    {"target": "9", "sources": ["5-9"], "op": "copy"},

  "derive": null,
  "transpose": false,
  "notes": "Used Table 13A (All Active Participants), which already covers the whole plan; Tables 13B and 13C are the Group A and Group B subsets whose cells sum to 13A, so no derive-sum is needed. Source has single-year service columns 0,1,2,3,4 that are summed into target column '4' (0-4). The source '35+' column maps to target '40' (35-40). Age row labels map directly to target upper bounds. Excluded 'All Ages' row and 'All' service total column; retained them as printed_row_totals/printed_col_totals."
}
